name: 68.25" Dosinia Bookshelf Brown - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee
description:
Elegantly display your collection of books, toys, vases and other items with the Dosinia Bookshelf from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. This brown bookshelf is designed with shelves and drawers to give you ample space for items you want to display or tuck away. Crafted from wood in a vertical alignment, this bookshelf works well with your existing decor style.

Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Looks like home, feels like you.
